description: A cute chibi humanoid desktop companion.

office.description: Using a computer with visible keyboard, mouse, screen, eye, and hand changes.

thinking.description: Thinking with one hand supporting the chin, changing gaze, blink, and head tilt.

fitness.description: Working out with dumbbells through a readable lift, press, squat, and recovery cycle.

resting.description: Sleeping or resting with closed eyes, breathing, head movement, and a relaxed pose.
